title: Astro-Dating — Computational Archaeoastronomy & Solar Prediction
description: Independent verification of historical chronology through astronomical calculations (16 anchor events across 9 civilizations, ~3300 years) and a probabilistic forecast of the next Grand Solar Minimum from multi-proxy spectral analysis (5 proxies, 55,000 years).

creators.name: Dmitriev, Alexander
creators.affiliation: Russian National Public Library for Science and Technology (GPNTB)
